tools.name: acl.calendarAclDelete
tools.description: Deletes an access control rule.

tools.name: acl.calendarAclGet
tools.description: Returns an access control rule.

tools.name: acl.calendarAclInsert
tools.description: Creates an access control rule.

tools.name: acl.calendarAclList
tools.description: Returns the rules in the access control list for the calendar.

tools.name: acl.calendarAclPatch
tools.description: Updates an access control rule. This method supports patch semantics.

tools.name: acl.calendarAclUpdate
tools.description: Updates an access control rule.

tools.name: acl.calendarAclWatch
tools.description: Watch for changes to ACL resources.

tools.name: calendarList.calendarCalendarListDelete
tools.description: Removes a calendar from the user's calendar list.

tools.name: calendarList.calendarCalendarListGet
tools.description: Returns a calendar from the user's calendar list.

tools.name: calendarList.calendarCalendarListInsert
tools.description: Inserts an existing calendar into the user's calendar list.

tools.name: calendarList.calendarCalendarListList
tools.description: Returns the calendars on the user's calendar list.

tools.name: calendarList.calendarCalendarListPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing calendar on the user's calendar list. This method supports patch semantics.

tools.name: calendarList.calendarCalendarListUpdate
tools.description: Updates an existing calendar on the user's calendar list.

tools.name: calendarList.calendarCalendarListWatch
tools.description: Watch for changes to CalendarList resources.

tools.name: calendars.calendarCalendarsClear
tools.description: Clears a primary calendar. This operation deletes all events associated with the primary calendar of an account.

tools.name: calendars.calendarCalendarsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a secondary calendar. Use calendars.clear for clearing all events on primary calendars.

tools.name: calendars.calendarCalendarsGet
tools.description: Returns metadata for a calendar.

tools.name: calendars.calendarCalendarsInsert
tools.description: Creates a secondary calendar.

tools.name: calendars.calendarCalendarsPatch
tools.description: Updates metadata for a calendar. This method supports patch semantics.

tools.name: calendars.calendarCalendarsUpdate
tools.description: Updates metadata for a calendar.

tools.name: channels.calendarChannelsStop
tools.description: Stop watching resources through this channel

tools.name: colors.calendarColorsGet
tools.description: Returns the color definitions for calendars and events.

tools.name: events.calendarEventsDelete
tools.description: Deletes an event.

tools.name: events.calendarEventsGet
tools.description: Returns an event based on its Google Calendar ID. To retrieve an event using its iCalendar ID, call the events.list method using the iCalUID parameter.

tools.name: events.calendarEventsImport
tools.description: Imports an event. This operation is used to add a private copy of an existing event to a calendar.

tools.name: events.calendarEventsInsert
tools.description: Creates an event.

tools.name: events.calendarEventsInstances
tools.description: Returns instances of the specified recurring event.

tools.name: events.calendarEventsList
tools.description: Returns events on the specified calendar.

tools.name: events.calendarEventsMove
tools.description: Moves an event to another calendar, i.e. changes an event's organizer.

tools.name: events.calendarEventsPatch
tools.description: Updates an event. This method supports patch semantics.

tools.name: events.calendarEventsQuickAdd
tools.description: Creates an event based on a simple text string.

tools.name: events.calendarEventsUpdate
tools.description: Updates an event.

tools.name: events.calendarEventsWatch
tools.description: Watch for changes to Events resources.

tools.name: freebusy.calendarFreebusyQuery
tools.description: Returns free/busy information for a set of calendars.

tools.name: settings.calendarSettingsGet
tools.description: Returns a single user setting.

tools.name: settings.calendarSettingsList
tools.description: Returns all user settings for the authenticated user.

tools.name: settings.calendarSettingsWatch
tools.description: Watch for changes to Settings resources.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
